Class JasperOdsExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExcelExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.JasperOdsExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExcelExporter, JasperIExporter, JasperIOdsExporter, Serializable
public class JasperOdsExporter extends AbstractJasperExcelExporter implements JasperIOdsExporter

JasperOdsExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
